title: RNA viral reference database
author: Wu, Ruonan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The RNA viral reference database was composed of (1) 6,621 complete RNA viral genomes collected from the NCBI virus database (accessed on August 12 th , 2022, [1]), (2) 378,253 RNA viral contigs from the RVMT database (v3)[2], and (3) 858 RNA viral genomes published in a terrestrial RNA viral study [3].  
  [1] NCBI virus database, accessible at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/labs/virus/vssi/#/  
  [2]  Neri U, Wolf YI, Roux S, Camargo AP, Lee B, Kazlauskas D, Chen IM, Ivanova N, Allen LZ, Paez-Espino D.     2022. Expansion of the global RNA virome reveals diverse clades of bacteriophages. Cell 185:4023-4037. e18.   
  [3]  Chen Y-M, Sadiq S, Tian J-H, Chen X, Lin X-D, Shen J-J, Chen H, Hao Z-Y, Wille M, Zhou Z-C.     2022. RNA viromes from terrestrial sites across China expand environmental viral diversity. Nature Microbiology 7:1312-1323.
steps_raw:
The RNA viral reference database was composed of (1) 6,621 complete RNA viral genomes collected from the NCBI virus database (accessed on August 12 th , 2022, [1]), (2) 378,253 RNA viral contigs from the RVMT database (v3)[2], and (3) 858 RNA viral genomes published in a terrestrial RNA viral study [3].  
  [1] NCBI virus database, accessible at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/labs/virus/vssi/#/  
  [2]  Neri U, Wolf YI, Roux S, Camargo AP, Lee B, Kazlauskas D, Chen IM, Ivanova N, Allen LZ, Paez-Espino D.     2022. Expansion of the global RNA virome reveals diverse clades of bacteriophages. Cell 185:4023-4037. e18.   
  [3]  Chen Y-M, Sadiq S, Tian J-H, Chen X, Lin X-D, Shen J-J, Chen H, Hao Z-Y, Wille M, Zhou Z-C.     2022. RNA viromes from terrestrial sites across China expand environmental viral diversity. Nature Microbiology 7:1312-1323.
